description_long: This is a modern, single-story house set within a walled property featuring a spacious backyard with a swimming pool and abundant greenery. The house has a flat roof and a layout that includes multiple rooms, visible through the open floor plan and large windows. The exterior walls are a mix of neutral tones, with sections of dark and light materials, likely concrete, brick, and glass. The property is surrounded by a tall perimeter wall, providing privacy and security, and the landscaping includes mature trees and manicured lawns. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal steps, blending seamlessly into the overall design. Large glass panels and sliding doors connect the interior to the outdoor living spaces, emphasizing openness and integration with nature.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious backyard featuring a pool and lush landscaping, all enclosed by a tall perimeter wall.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an elevated angle, highlighting the open floor plan, backyard pool, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side perspective, emphasizing the length of the property, the perimeter wall, and the dense greenery at the rear.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a rear view, focusing on the backyard pool, thick foliage, and the back facade of the house with large glass doors.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the house from the opposite side, showing the flat roof, outdoor seating areas, and the integration of indoor and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels and sliding doors
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a simple door, no prominent porch, and direct access from the front yard
